patch.value: Promote item lifecycle primitives to the public SDK: create, update, close, claim/release, copy, delete, restore, focus

Typed, documented SDK functions for the full item mutation lifecycle incl. bulk variants (update-many/close-many), checkpoint/rollback semantics, and governance enforcement — the same code paths the CLI runs. Duplicate check: SDK today only exposes extension-authoring helpers; no lifecycle-primitive item exists.

SDK exports typed lifecycle primitives with input/result contracts matching CLI behavior (incl. never-block error payloads); corresponding CLI handlers consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero CLI behavior change (mutation specs green)

Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/sdk/sdk-index.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (5448 tests, 100/100/100/100).
